case_title: EPHRAIM ZENAS FERNANDEZ et al VS. ERIKA VELIZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT VELIZ, ERIKA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-18-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS,(2) ONLY. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. FIOL. NOT REPORTED. (506)
